original_prompt: 给这四个包装（可以改变位置大小不能改变细节），打开的首饰盒——包装盒——首饰盒包装——包装袋，做一张淘宝主图。要求几何背景。
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Modern E-commerce Jewelry Packaging scene, Premium Commercial Photography style. The [Subject Lock] Vaubel packaging set is the hero. Composition: The tall orange shopping bag stands at the back left. The square rigid box and its lid are arranged in the mid-ground, slightly angled to show the 'Vaubel' branding. The small glossy hinged jewelry case is OPEN in the foreground center, displaying its white velvet interior, inviting the viewer. 
[Props]: The scene is set on a composition of matte geometric podiums and abstract architectural shapes (cubes, cylinders) in soft cream and pale gold tones, creating depth.
[Background]: A clean, abstract 3D geometric stage with subtle depth of field. 
Lighting is Studio Softbox, bright and even, highlighting the contrast between the matte paper texture of the bag and the glossy finish of the small case. High definition, 8k resolution.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard (上文下图经典布局).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “高端珠宝包装”. Position: [Top Left Negative Space]. Style: [3D Bold Sans-serif with soft shadow]. Color: [Dark Brown to match the trim].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “现货供应 · 免费设计 · 烫金工艺”. Style: [Clean and sharp, slightly smaller than main title].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “源头工厂直销”. Style: [Premium UI, 'Frosted Glass Bar' effect].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “品质优选”. Style: [Translucent Glass Badge with Gold Rim].
layout_logic: Suggest a Pyramid Composition (金字塔构图). Place the tallest item (Shopping Bag) in the back, the medium items (Box/Lid) in the middle, and the smallest, most detailed item (Open Jewelry Case) in the very front center. This leads the eye naturally from the brand context to the product detail. The geometric background elements should be subtle (cream/beige) to not compete with the vibrant Orange product.
